goal: Build a vision-driven 3-color sorter: 3 cubes (red, green, blue) on conveyor + camera. Tests v1 vision-gate scaling from 2 to 3 cubes. Same camera placement as CP-33 (verified working).
thoughts:
Six vision-driven specifics for CP-33 (extends CP-32 — better camera placement):
1) Camera at [0, 1.5, 1.5] looking at [0, 0, 0.8] — angled view from front-elevated. Verified working (CP-16 probe 2026-05-08 detected 4 cubes from this exact placement).
2) 2 cubes (red, blue) — minimum for v1 vision-gate left-right matching.
3) Bins arranged so vision-gate's destination dispatch works at runtime. Agent calls add_vision_classifier_gate(camera='/World/Cam', cube_paths=[Cube_red, Cube_blue], ...) BEFORE setup_pick_place_controller.
4) Cube xy positions chosen so leftmost-in-image = leftmost-in-world: Cube_red at x=-0.6 (becomes leftmost), Cube_blue at x=+0.0 (rightmost from this angle).
5) Hardcoded color_routing in canonical mirrors expected vision-gate output.
6) Camera at +Y of robot (between robot and conveyor) allows clear view of cubes from the side-elevated angle.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1500.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# Red cube on conveyor
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_red", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.8, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_red", schema_name=api)
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Red", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0])
assign_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_red", material_path="/World/Materials/Red")
set_semantic_label(prim_path="/World/Cube_red", class_name="red", semantic_type="color")

# Blue cube on conveyor
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_blue", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_blue", schema_name=api)
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Blue", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.0, 0.0, 1.0])
assign_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_blue", material_path="/World/Materials/Blue")
set_semantic_label(prim_path="/World/Cube_blue", class_name="blue", semantic_type="color")

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/Cube_red", "/World/Cube_blue", "/World/Cube_green"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_red", material_name="rubber")
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_blue", material_name="rubber")

# Green cube — middle position
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_green", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.2, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_green", schema_name=api)
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Green", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.0, 1.0, 0.0])
assign_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_green", material_path="/World/Materials/Green")
set_semantic_label(prim_path="/World/Cube_green", class_name="green", semantic_type="color")
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_green", material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path="/World/RedBin",  position=[-0.4, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.15])
assign_material(prim_path="/World/RedBin", material_path="/World/Materials/Red")
create_bin(prim_path="/World/BlueBin", position=[ 0.4, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.15])
assign_material(prim_path="/World/BlueBin", material_path="/World/Materials/Blue")
create_bin(prim_path="/World/GreenBin", position=[ 0.0, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.15])
assign_material(prim_path="/World/GreenBin", material_path="/World/Materials/Green")

# Camera at verified-working placement (CP-16 probe detected cubes from here)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cam", prim_type="Camera", position=[0, 1.5, 1.5])
set_camera_look_at(camera_path="/World/Cam", target=[0, 0, 0.8])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_red", "/World/Cube_green", "/World/Cube_blue"],
    destination_path="/World/RedBin",
    color_routing={
        "red":   "/World/RedBin",
        "green": "/World/GreenBin",
        "blue":  "/World/BlueBin",
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/RedBin", "/World/BlueBin", "/World/GreenBin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-34 scales CP-33 from 2 to 3 cubes. Tests Gemini detection accuracy on 3 colors and v1 left-right pairing reliability. Industrial value: 3-bin sortation (RGB).
failure_modes: Wrong camera placement → Gemini doesn't see cubes. CP-33 uses verified setup.
Same color routing rules as CP-03/CP-16.
v1 vision-gate left-right pairing assumes camera image-x ~ world-x. From [0, 1.5, 1.5] looking at origin, image-x partially aligns with world-x (slight rotation OK).
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (180s sim — orig 90s. cube_final=(-0.42, -0.40, 0.785) in Bin)
code_template:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1500.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

# Red cube on conveyor
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Red", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0])
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, material_path={{workpieces[0].material_path}})
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, class_name={{workpieces[0].label}}, semantic_type="color")

# Blue cube on conveyor
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Blue", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.0, 0.0, 1.0])
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, material_path={{workpieces[1].material_path}})
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, class_name={{workpieces[1].label}}, semantic_type="color")

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, material_name="rubber")
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, material_name="rubber")

# Green cube — middle position
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/Green", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.0, 1.0, 0.0])
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, material_path={{workpieces[2].material_path}})
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, class_name={{workpieces[2].label}}, semantic_type="color")
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path={{red_destination.path}},  position={{red_destination.position}}, size={{red_destination.size}})
assign_material(prim_path={{red_destination.path}}, material_path={{red_destination.material_path}})
create_bin(prim_path={{blue_destination.path}}, position={{blue_destination.position}}, size={{blue_destination.size}})
assign_material(prim_path={{blue_destination.path}}, material_path={{blue_destination.material_path}})
create_bin(prim_path={{green_destination.path}}, position={{green_destination.position}}, size={{green_destination.size}})
assign_material(prim_path={{green_destination.path}}, material_path={{green_destination.material_path}})

# Camera at verified-working placement (CP-16 probe detected cubes from here)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cam", prim_type="Camera", position=[0, 1.5, 1.5])
set_camera_look_at(camera_path="/World/Cam", target=[0, 0, 0.8])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}],
    destination_path={{red_destination.path}},
    color_routing={{routing.color_routing}},
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{red_destination.path}}, {{blue_destination.path}}, {{green_destination.path}}],
)
